name: satori-manifest/price-list
title: Manifest
description: Display a structured price list with sections and items. Powered by Satori Manifest.

manifestIds.description: IDs of the manifest posts to display.

colorScheme.description: Colour scheme applied to the block wrapper.

showDescriptions.description: Whether to display item description lines.

pricePrefix.description: Global price prefix override (e.g. 'from'). Overrides per-item prefix when set.

customBgColor.description: Custom scheme background colour (hex). Used when colorScheme is 'custom'.

customAccentColor.description: Custom scheme accent/text colour (hex). Used when colorScheme is 'custom'.

customTitleColor.description: Custom scheme section title colour (hex). Falls back to customAccentColor when empty.

customCardColor.description: Custom scheme section/card background colour (hex). Falls back to a semi-transparent white when empty.

showBackground.description: Whether to render the scheme background colour on the wrapper.

cardPadding.description: Whether to apply padding inside each section card.

titlePadding.description: Whether to apply padding to the section title heading.

showItemBorder.description: Whether to show the border-bottom underline on each list item.

titleBgColor.description: Background colour applied to section title headings (hex).

titleFontSize.description: Section title font size in pixels. 0 means inherit from scheme.

titleFontWeight.description: Section title font weight (e.g. '700'). Empty means inherit from scheme.

titleFontFamily.description: Section title font family stack. Empty means inherit from theme.

itemFontSize.description: List item name font size in pixels. 0 means inherit.

itemFontWeight.description: List item name font weight. Empty means inherit from scheme.

itemFontFamily.description: List item name font family stack. Empty means inherit from theme.
